data.title: Binance Launches Flexible Lending Promotion with Up to 3 BNB Rewards
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance announced the launch of a flexible lending (floating rate) promotion, where users can win up to 3 BNB rewards by borrowing USDT or USDC. The event will run from March 14 to April 5, 2025. Participants need to borrow at least $1,000 worth of USDT or USDC, and the top 50 users will share the BNB rewards based on the average daily lending amount. In addition, new users participating in Event B will have the opportunity to receive an additional 0.1 BNB reward. The rewards will be distributed to the user's spot account within four weeks after the event ends.

data.title: A whale hoarded $3.66 million in WIF, with a floating profit of $225,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, a whale withdrew 8.044 million WIF (worth $3.66 million) from Binance 6 hours ago, with an average price of $0.4554. With the price of WIF rising by 9.29% in 12 hours, the whale's current position has made a floating profit of $225,000. This operation shows the whale's strong bullish expectations for WIF and may further promote the market's attention to the token.

data.title: A whale lost $6.62 million in 15 days and then deposited 5,000 ETH to Binance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to On chain Lens monitoring, a whale address lost $6.62 million due to price drops after holding 5,000 ETH (about $9.46 million) for 15 days, and then deposited it in Binance. The whale withdrew 10,000 ETH (about $25.6 million) from Deribit 15 days ago and currently still holds 5,000 ETH (about $9.51 million). This operation shows that the whale chose to partially stop loss in market fluctuations.

data.title: Modular protocol Hemi mainnet officially launched
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Modular protocol Hemi tweeted that its mainnet is officially launched, aiming to integrate the two major ecosystems of Bitcoin and Ethereum. Hemi provides comprehensive DeFi functions, such as token exchange, liquidity mining and cross-chain asset transfer. Users can use Bitcoin assets to participate in the Ethereum ecosystem and promote cross-chain interaction and innovation.

data.title: nunu.ai Completes $6 Million Seed Round, Led by TIRTA Ventures and a16z Speedrun
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News nunu.ai has completed a $6 million seed round of financing, led by TIRTA Ventures and a16z speedrun, with participation from Factorial Funds, Y Combinator, Earthling, Hartmann Capital, FOV Ventures and New Renaissance Ventures.
nunu.ai focuses on the intersection of artificial intelligence, games and robotics, and is committed to building the first AI agent that can test and play games, promoting the intelligent development of the game industry.

data.title: Nansen Points System is now online
data.description: Nansen CEO Alex Svanevik announced on the X platform that Nansen points can now be obtained by staking tokens on Nansen, but it is not clear what the points are used for. Currently supported tokens include: HYPE, TRX, SUI, SOL, RON, ATOM, TIA, DYDX, STRK, NEAR, TKX, BAND, KAVA, SKL, AKT, OSMO, CTK, APT.

data.title: Lazarus Group Deposits 400 ETH Into Tornado Cash
data.description: According to Foresight News, CertiK Alert has reported that 400 ETH, valued at approximately $760,000, has been deposited into Tornado Cash by the Lazarus Group. The funds are linked to the group's activities on the Bitcoin network.

data.title: Opinion: PayPal and large banks are rushing into the stablecoin market, and Tether and Circle's business models are facing challenges
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News PitchBook analyst Robert Le pointed out that as PayPal and large banks enter the stablecoin market, the business models of Tether and Circle are at risk. Although Tether and Circle currently occupy 90% of the stablecoin market, Le believes that this dominance will be weakened by increased competition. PayPal's PYUSD has a market value of US$700 million since its launch in 2023, and traditional financial institutions such as Bank of America are also waiting for clear regulation to issue stablecoins. Le predicts that once the stablecoin bill is passed, hundreds or even thousands of stablecoins will emerge in the market, and Tether and Circle's market share will be squeezed.

data.title: Virtuals Protocol announces the launch of ACP, a multi-agent framework
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Virtuals Protocol announced the launch of the multi-agent framework ACP (Agency Business Protocol), which aims to make collaboration between AI Agents as natural and efficient as transactions between humans. The goal for the next month is to focus on the implementation of two business segments: autonomous hedge funds and trading DAOs, to conduct AI-driven smart investment management (negotiating cooperation with aixbt and AIxVC); 2. Autonomous media organizations to create high-quality, data-driven Web3 narratives (negotiating cooperation with luna_virtuals, MusicByVirtuals, etc.).

data.title: An ETH whale liquidated 6,401 ETH, losing $1.974 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, a whale address liquidated 6,401 ETH (about 12.23 million US dollars) bought in December 2023 3 hours ago, with a loss of 1.974 million US dollars. The whale's position cost was 2,219 US dollars, and the selling price was 1,910 US dollars. The assets shrank by 14% in 15 months. Although it gained income in multiple LRTs (liquidity re-pledge protocols) by staking ETH during this period, it still could not cover the loss.
